---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Whisperio
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Screenshots / Logs**
If applicable, add screenshots. You can also paste console output from DevTools (`Ctrl+Shift+I`).

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Whisperio version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- STT provider: [e.g. OpenAI, ElevenLabs, self-hosted]
- Self-hosted server (if applicable): [e.g. whisper.cpp, faster-whisper-server]

**Additional context**
Any other details — audio device, hotkey config, error notifications, etc.
